## 你想解決什麼問題 / What problem are you trying to solve?
<!-- 描述使用情境，不要直接跳到「請加 XYZ」/ Describe the use case rather than jumping to the solution -->


## 你心目中的解法 / Proposed Solution
<!-- 你希望 edEdit 怎麼處理 / How would you like edEdit to handle it -->


## 替代方案 / Alternatives Considered
<!-- 有沒有想過其他做法？/ Have you thought of other approaches? -->


## 補充 / Additional Context
<!-- 螢幕截圖、別的 app 怎麼做的、相關文件等 / Screenshots, references, related links -->
